title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: As Finout enters its next growth phase, they seek a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the operational backbone of the GTM engine, reporting to the CRO. Requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, or Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling revenue beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. A hands-on leader-doer comfortable owning executive strategy discussions while building flows, dashboards, and data models, collaborating across time zones with the Tel Aviv HQ.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps/GTM with deep Salesforce expertise and pipeline forecasting experience directly aligns with Finout's Head of RevOps requirements. The Tel Aviv HQ location matches his geographic preferences perfectly, and the $30M+ ARR scaling mandate fits his senior executive background.
ai_opener: Omri Gonen here—I've spent 15+ years building revenue operations engines for B2B SaaS companies, and Finout's mission to bring FinOps transparency resonates deeply given the complexity of scaling GTM operations. Your Head of RevOps role mirrors the exact inflection point I've navigated multiple times: moving from founder-led GTM to a scalable, data-driven revenue organization with Salesforce as the backbone. I'd love to explore how my experience scaling revenue ops beyond $30M ARR could accelerate Finout's next growth phase.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
location: Hybrid (in-office 2x per week at hub locations)
description: As a Revenue Operations Manager focused on Territory Strategy & Operations, you'll accelerate revenue growth and seller productivity through data-driven investment strategy, scalable territory design, and consultative partnership with leaders. Requires 3–5+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Strategy, or GTM planning, deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models and segmentation, strong analytical skills (Excel, SQL, BI tools like Tableau/Retool), and Salesforce proficiency. You'll maintain territory mapping in CRM/territory tools (Fullcast, Salesforce), lead special projects like market expansion and rep capacity modeling, and partner with Sales leadership and Finance.
score_reason: Omri is a perfect match for this role with 15+ years B2B SaaS RevOps expertise, deep GTM and territory strategy knowledge, and demonstrated Salesforce/BI tool proficiency. The Territory Strategy & Operations focus directly aligns with his CAC/LTV pipeline forecasting strengths and senior-level experience.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across the RevOps Manager role at Gong focused on Territory Strategy & Operations—your 15+ years building scalable GTM models and territory frameworks in B2B SaaS seems like exactly what they're building. With your background optimizing seller productivity through data-driven segmentation and CRM strategy, you'd be a natural fit to accelerate their revenue operations at scale.

title: RevOps Systems Manager
description: The RevOps Systems Manager is responsible for the administration, optimization, and strategic oversight of Salesforce and other RevOps-owned systems at hospitality-tech SaaS company Actabl. Requires Salesforce Advanced Administrator and App Builder certifications, 5+ years hands-on Salesforce administration managing complex orgs independently, and experience managing RevOps tools (Outreach, Gong, PandaDoc, ZoomInfo, LinkedIn Sales Nav). You'll design scalable Salesforce solutions including automation, workflows, Lightning flows, and custom objects, manage integrations, oversee license management and cost optimization, and provide training and documentation.
score_reason: Strong Salesforce expertise and RevOps systems background align well with core requirements. However, this is a specialized systems administration role rather than a strategic Head of RevOps position—slightly underleveled for a 15+ year senior executive, though the hospitality-tech vertical and tool stack (Outreach, Gong, PandaDoc) are solid fits.
ai_opener: Hi [Hiring Manager], I noticed Actabl is scaling its RevOps infrastructure—I've spent 15+ years building and optimizing Salesforce-centric RevOps stacks at B2B SaaS companies, managing the exact tool ecosystem you're using (Outreach, Gong, PandaDoc integrations). While my background leans more strategic than pure admin, I'd be interested in exploring how this role could expand into broader RevOps ownership as you grow.
